kvkk.title: Privacy Notice
kvkk.intro: This notice explains how Bon Air Havacılık Sanayi ve Ticaret A.Ş. ("Bon Air") collects, uses, and protects personal data in the BonAcademy learning platform.

controller.heading: 1. Data Controller
controller.body: Bon Air Havacılık Sanayi ve Ticaret A.Ş. ("Bon Air") acts as the data controller for personal data processed through BonAcademy. You may contact us at

dataCollected.heading: 2. Personal Data We Process
items: Identity: first name, last name, date of birth, place of birth
Training and exam records: SCORM progress data (CMI), exam answers, scores, certificates
Audit records: sign-in and sign-out times, administrator action logs (audit log), IP address

purpose.heading: 3. Purposes and Legal Basis of Processing
purpose.body: We process your personal data to (a) plan and track mandatory training and to meet regulatory compliance obligations (such as DGCA, EASA and other aviation regulations), (b) issue and verify certificates, and (c) maintain information security and audit records. The legal bases include compliance with legal obligations, performance of the employment relationship, and our legitimate interests in operating a compliant training programme.

transfer.heading: 4. Data Transfers
transfer.body: Personal data is processed on hosting infrastructure provided by Vercel Inc. (USA) and Neon Inc. (USA), with email delivery through Microsoft 365 (Microsoft Ireland Operations Ltd.) and bot protection through Google LLC (reCAPTCHA). Cross-border transfers are carried out under applicable safeguards.

retention.heading: 5. Retention Period
retention.body: Training and certificate records are retained for the period required by applicable aviation regulations (typically the duration of employment plus 10 years). Audit logs are retained for at least 1 year in line with information-security standards. At the end of the retention period, data is deleted, destroyed, or anonymised.

rights.heading: 6. Your Rights
rights.body: You have the right to learn whether your personal data is being processed, request information about such processing, request correction or deletion, learn the third parties to which it has been transferred, object to processing, and request compensation if you suffer harm from unlawful processing. You may submit requests to

cookies.heading: 7. Cookies
cookies.body: Only strictly necessary cookies are used for authentication sessions and security verification (Google reCAPTCHA). No advertising or marketing tracking cookies are used.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: BonAcademy is the internal training-management system of Bon Air Havacılık Sanayi ve Ticaret A.Ş. This policy summarises our general approach to employee personal data. For the formal disclosure required under the Turkish KVKK, please see the

collection.heading: 1. Data We Collect
collection.body: We process only work-related data: identity, corporate e-mail, department/role, training & exam records, audit logs (sign-in time, IP address).

use.heading: 2. Purposes of Use
use.body: Data is used to plan mandatory training, issue certificates, meet aviation regulatory obligations (SHGM/EASA) and ensure information security. We do not process data for marketing.

sharing.heading: 3. Third Parties
sharing.body: Data is shared with infrastructure providers (Vercel, Neon, Microsoft 365) and a security-verification provider (Google reCAPTCHA) under contractual safeguards. Data is never sold to advertisers or analytics third parties.

retention.heading: 4. Retention
retention.body: Training and certification records are kept for the period required by aviation regulations (typically employment + 10 years). Audit logs are kept for at least 1 year.

security.heading: 5. Security
security.body: Data is transmitted over encrypted connections (HTTPS); access is role-restricted. Passwords are hashed with bcrypt.

rights.heading: 6. Your Rights
rights.body: To access, correct or delete your data, contact

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: These Terms of Use apply to Bon Air employees accessing the BonAcademy internal training-management system. By using the platform you agree to these terms.

scope.heading: 1. Scope
scope.body: BonAcademy is an internal Learning Management System (LMS) of Bon Air Havacılık Sanayi ve Ticaret A.Ş. and is reserved for designated users. The system may not be opened to third parties for commercial purposes.

account.heading: 2. Account Responsibility
account.body: You are responsible for the security of your account. Do not share your password. Report suspected unauthorised access to IT support immediately.

use.heading: 3. Acceptable Use
use.body: Use the system only for assigned training, exams and certification. Automated scraping, reverse engineering, unauthorised data extraction, and any activity that may affect other users are prohibited.

records.heading: 4. Training Records
records.body: Training, exam and certification records are kept per aviation regulations. Both the user and the manager are jointly responsible for their accuracy and currency.

ip.heading: 5. Intellectual Property
ip.body: All platform content (SCORM packages, question banks, certificate templates, brand assets) belongs to Bon Air or its licensors. No reproduction or distribution is permitted without consent.

termination.heading: 6. Termination of Access
termination.body: Access may be terminated upon end of employment, role change, or breach of these terms. Records required by regulation will continue to be retained.

law.heading: 7. Governing Law
law.body: These terms are governed by Turkish law. The courts and enforcement offices of Istanbul shall have jurisdiction over any disputes.

contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: Use the channels below for any BonAcademy-related queries.

company.heading: Company
company.name: Bon Air Havacılık Sanayi ve Ticaret A.Ş.

training.heading: Training Administration
training.body: For assignments, plans or content requests, contact your department manager or HR.
